summary: This bundle records deterministic proof for active-run workspace pinning and for `claim discover` emitting source-ref-backed proof-plan packets rather than verdicts.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: active-run workspace routing and declared-claim proof planning
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the shared active-run precedence/reuse behavior and the proof-plan packet shape are marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Every active-run-aware command is exhaustively covered by this bundle
LLM-backed claim review, eval planning, or fixture authoring happened during claim discovery

notableAssertions: claim discovery excludes prompt examples, label definitions, and open probe questions
claim discovery keeps deterministic, human-auditable, and Cautilus-eval routing distinct
claim discovery emits source-ref-backed claim candidates from declared docs
the proof-plan packet includes multiple recommendedProof routes
refresh-plan output cannot overwrite saved claim-state proof-plan paths
CAUTILUS_RUN_DIR is reused when no explicit outputDir is provided
missing or file-valued CAUTILUS_RUN_DIR fails loudly
workflow-creating helpers auto-materialize a runDir only when no explicit or active run exists
prepare-compare reuses the active runDir and rewires worktrees on retry

decision.reason: The targeted runtime and CLI tests prove the stated active-run reuse behavior and the deterministic proof-plan packet boundary for claim discovery.
